# freehtmltopdf.app

> Free, browser-based HTML to PDF converter. Paste code or upload .html files, preview live, configure page settings, download PDF. No signup, no server uploads. Part of Freesuite.

## Key Facts
- 100% client-side — all conversion runs in your browser via html2pdf.js
- Supports A4, Letter, Legal, A3, A5, Tabloid page sizes
- Portrait and landscape orientation
- Adjustable margins: none, small (10mm), normal (20mm), large (30mm)
- Quality settings: 1x (fast), 2x (default), 3x (high)
- Built-in templates: blank, resume, invoice, report, letter
- Drag-and-drop .html file upload
- Live preview with auto-refresh
- Works offline after first visit (PWA with service worker)
- Dark mode support

## Features
- HTML code editor with monospace font and tab support
- Live preview in sandboxed iframe
- PDF generation with configurable page size, orientation, margins, quality
- File upload and drag-and-drop
- 5 starter templates (blank, resume, invoice, report, letter)
- Resizable split panels (editor + preview)
- Mobile-responsive with tabbed interface
- Keyboard shortcut: Ctrl+Enter to generate PDF
- Auto-filename from HTML <title> tag

## CSS Support
- Inline CSS and internal stylesheets
- Flexbox layouts (recommended)
- CSS variables, gradients, box shadows
- Custom fonts via @font-face with base64 data
- Limited CSS Grid support
- Base64 data URI images

## Pages
- [Home](https://freehtmltopdf.app/) — Main HTML to PDF converter tool
- [vs wkhtmltopdf](https://freehtmltopdf.app/vs-wkhtmltopdf) — Comparison with wkhtmltopdf command-line tool
- [vs PDFShift](https://freehtmltopdf.app/vs-pdfshift) — Comparison with PDFShift paid API
- [HTML Invoice to PDF](https://freehtmltopdf.app/html-invoice-to-pdf) — Convert HTML invoices to PDF
- [HTML Resume to PDF](https://freehtmltopdf.app/html-resume-to-pdf) — Convert HTML resumes to PDF
- [How to Convert HTML to PDF](https://freehtmltopdf.app/convert-html-to-pdf) — Step-by-step guide

For the complete text content of all pages, see [llms-full.txt](https://freehtmltopdf.app/llms-full.txt).
